{{CargoOrgan
|name=Bewitching Eye
|type=Bionic
|rank=green
|id=10646
|idx=2
|description=It is said that this eyeball was made by the Demon God. Its gaze will make people fall into madness and give everything for it, including their lives!
|skill=Before round start, summon the Bewitching Eye, increasing the Break Chance by 65% this round
|hp=350
|def=89
|atk=40
|rush=43
|gene1=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +2.5%
|gene2=In explorations, {race} RUSH +20
|gene7=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +2.5% (Awakened)
|}}
